biggest_targets.next_action: Reduce launch count/readbacks first; graph replay only becomes attractive after kernel count drops or capture/replay overhead is revalidated.
biggest_targets.why: Largest wall-time bucket: 19.42 ms/pass (51.3% of verify window). It includes launch gaps, stream sync, and 7 scalar accept-payload D2H reads/pass.

biggest_targets.next_action: Add callsite markers or scoped profiling before changing shared-expert-only kernels; prioritize exact W4 projection consolidation if callsite attribution confirms it.
biggest_targets.why: Largest GPU-kernel bucket: 6.58 ms/pass and 300 launches/pass; contains W4 small-batch projection callsites including shared expert/dense/full-attn projections.

biggest_targets.next_action: Continue consolidation only with a cost model that reduces kernel time, not just launches; previous selected gate/up staged rotate regressed.
biggest_targets.why: Selected MoE still costs 4.98 ms/pass and 400 launches/pass, including 190 rotate launches/pass.

biggest_targets.next_action: Consider t-loop fusion or row-batched linear-attn kernels after W4/MoE launch count is lower.
biggest_targets.why: Linear Conv/GDN costs 2.73 ms/pass and 60 launches/pass; it is the next sizable target after W4/MoE buckets.

commands.create_prompt_tokens:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
for line in Path('fixtures/dflash/stable_prompts.jsonl').read_text().splitlines():
    row = json.loads(line)
    if row.get('id') == 'code:quicksort_prefix':
        Path('/tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt').write_text(','.join(map(str, row['prompt_ids'])))
        break
PY

summary: rocprofv3 kernel-family rollup for the current MTP B=3 shared target verifier window on W7900/gfx1100.

task_family_rollup.description: Non-kernel time inside mtp_verify_pass markers: HIP launches, stream synchronization, GPU accept-summary D2H readback, Python/HIP runtime gaps.
task_family_rollup.name: host_d2h_sync_launch_residual
notes: Computed as roctx verify-pass wall time minus summed kernel durations after skipping the first two cold cycles.
D2H readback is the default GPU-accept payload (7 tiny scalar arrays/pass); top1/full logits are not read back.

task_family_rollup.description: W4 small-batch projection bucket used by shared expert, dense MLP, full/linear QKV/O callsites; kernel names do not distinguish callsite.
task_family_rollup.name: shared_dense_w4_projection_bucket
notes: Largest GPU-kernel wall bucket; needs callsite-aware profiling before claiming shared-expert-only changes.

task_family_rollup.description: Selected-expert MoE verifier work: router/top-k, selected gate/up GEMV, staged selected down GEMV, PARO rotations, route combine.
task_family_rollup.name: selected_moe

extra_kernel_examples: void (anonymous namespace)::qwen35_linear_attn_chain_conv_decode_lowp_tloop_kernel<_Float16>(_Float16 const*, float const*, float*, float const*, float*, long, long, long)
task_family_rollup.name: linear_conv_gdn

task_family_rollup.description: Full-attention verifier attention + K/V write kernels (projection kernels are in the W4 bucket).
task_family_rollup.name: full_attention_verifier_attention_kv

task_family_rollup.description: Verifier LM-head / row top1 path: W8A16 lm-head logits plus argmax stage kernels.
task_family_rollup.name: lm_head_top1

task_family_rollup.description: RMSNorm and small format/split kernels not otherwise grouped.
task_family_rollup.name: rmsnorm_misc_format
notes: Starts from profiler families rmsnorm+other and subtracts Conv/commit/accept rows broken out above.
